description: Style NoteThis fastrack watch gets a new season update in its styling and design details. For maximum impact, style this with your off-duty staples and throw on a few tonal accessories for added measure. This zingy time piece is sure to give a face-lift to your summer wardrobe!Product DetailsCase style:  Analog watch with steel round case and a branding on the bezelDial style: Blue dial with silver handsStrap style: Steel strap with a butterfly claspFeatures: Brand logo on the 12 hour markWater resistant 50 M that can be used around sinks and rain splashesWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 35 mmCase thickness: 7 mm
